# AI Code Reviewer That Only Complains

> A satirical web app that parodies AI code review tools by delivering sarcastic, emotionally brutal complaints instead of actual feedback.

## What This Project Is

This is a humorous, retro-terminal-styled React application. Users paste code into a fake terminal interface and receive randomly selected sarcastic complaints, absurd issue reports, and devastating score ratings. No real code analysis is performed.

## Tech Stack

- React 18 with TypeScript
- Vite 5 (build tool)
- Tailwind CSS 3 (styling)
- Lucide React (icons)

## Key Files

- src/App.tsx: Main component with three-phase flow (idle, reviewing, done)
- src/data/reviewData.ts: All static complaint text, fake issues, and scores
- src/utils/glitch.ts: Text glitch effect and array shuffle
- src/components/CrtOverlay.tsx: CRT monitor visual effects
- src/components/ReviewFeedback.tsx: Displays complaints sequentially
- src/components/IssuesList.tsx: Shows fake detected issues
- src/components/ScoreBoard.tsx: Humorous ratings display
- src/components/Verdict.tsx: Final verdict component
- src/index.css: Global styles and CRT animations
- tailwind.config.js: Terminal theme colors (orange on black)

## How It Works

1. User pastes code into textarea
2. App selects 5 random complaints from a static array of 20
3. Complaints display one at a time with 400ms intervals
4. After complaints finish, 5 random fake issues appear with categories like EXISTENTIAL, EMOTIONAL, NUTRITIONAL
5. A scoreboard shows metrics rated 0-5 stars with sarcastic comments
6. A final verdict is displayed
7. User can reset and submit more code

## Development

```
npm install
npm run dev          # Start dev server at localhost:5173
npm run build        # Production build
npm run lint         # ESLint
npm run typecheck    # TypeScript validation
```

## Design

Retro CRT terminal aesthetic with orange text (#ff6600) on black background, JetBrains Mono font, scanline overlays, vignette effects, and glitching title animation. Themed as "Wender Media Emotional Intelligence Suite v6.6.6".

## Notes

- Entirely client-side, no backend or API calls
- @supabase/supabase-js is an unused dependency
- All content is static data in reviewData.ts
- The sarcastic tone is the entire point of the project
